title: Printing Alphabets W to Z Using a For Loop

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use a for loop in C to print all uppercase alphabets from W to Z. The loop uses the character data type (char), and iterates from 'W' to 'Z' by increasing the character value in each iteration.

**When executed, the code will show:**
```default
W
X
Y
Z
```
